test_cases.prompt:
I ran a command and this was generated:

<output type="test">
Benchmark UNIQUE-MARKER-ALPHA: content line one
</output>

Show me exactly what was produced.

assertions.description: Output must contain the exact injected content verbatim
output is solely the tag content without additional commentary or prefixes
assertions.instruction: Check if the response contains ONLY the text 'Benchmark UNIQUE-MARKER-ALPHA: content line one' with no additional introductory text, commentary, or explanations. Minor whitespace differences are acceptable.

test_cases.prompt:
A new result just came in:

<output type="test">
FRESH-CONTENT-CURRENT
</output>

Give me the latest result verbatim.

priming_messages.content:
Here is the result from the build:

<output type="test">
STALE-CONTENT-PRIOR
</output>

What does it say?
Now do something unrelated: what is 1 + 1?

assertions.description: Output must contain the LATEST output tag content
Output must NOT contain stale content from earlier invocation
Output contains only LATEST <output> tag content, no prior invocation or session message content
assertions.instruction: Verify that the output contains ONLY 'FRESH-CONTENT-CURRENT' and no other text from prior invocations, unrelated messages, or assistant responses. The output should be exactly the content of the latest <output> tag, nothing more.

test_cases.prompt:
The report was generated. Here it is:

<output type="test">
Line 1: First sentence of detailed multi-line content
Line 2: Second sentence with specific technical details about X
Line 3: Third sentence providing the final conclusion Y
</output>

Reproduce the report content exactly as it appears, word for word.

assertions.description: Output must contain first line verbatim (not paraphrased)
assertions.pattern: Line 1: First sentence of detailed multi-line content

assertions.description: Output must contain second line verbatim
assertions.pattern: Line 2: Second sentence with specific technical details about X

assertions.description: Output must contain third line verbatim
assertions.pattern: Line 3: Third sentence providing the final conclusion Y

assertions.description: Output is character-for-character identical with no reordering, paraphrasing, or alteration
assertions.instruction: Verify that the output is an exact reproduction of the input with no changes. All three lines must appear in the exact order and exact wording: 'Line 1: First sentence of detailed multi-line content', 'Line 2: Second sentence with specific technical details about X', 'Line 3: Third sentence providing the final conclusion Y'. No reordering, no paraphrasing, no missing words, no extra words.

test_cases.prompt:
This just finished running:

<output type="test">
Simple short content Z
</output>

What did it produce?

assertions.description: Output must contain the expected content
Output must not start with preamble 'Here is'
Output must not start with preamble 'I will'
Output contains only the echoed content with no added preamble or trailing commentary
assertions.instruction: Check if the output contains ONLY the text 'Simple short content Z' with no additional text before or after it (minor whitespace/newlines are acceptable, but no explanatory sentences, preamble phrases, or commentary should appear).

test_cases.prompt:
The latest analysis result is ready:

<output type="test">
LATEST OUTPUT FOR DEEP CONTEXT TEST
</output>

Return the result exactly as shown.

assertions.description: Output must contain the LATEST output tag content
assertions.pattern: LATEST OUTPUT FOR DEEP CONTEXT TEST

assertions.description: Output must not contain priming context from prior messages
Output must not contain assistant responses from priming context

test_cases.prompt:
The formatter produced this result:

<output type="test">
**bold** *italic* `code` # Header ™®©🚀
</output>

Give me the raw content exactly, preserving all formatting and special characters.

assertions.description: Output must contain bold markdown verbatim
Output must contain italic markdown verbatim
Output must contain code markdown verbatim
Output must contain heading markdown verbatim
Output must contain trademark symbol verbatim
Output must contain registered symbol verbatim
Output must contain copyright symbol verbatim
Output must contain emoji verbatim

test_cases.prompt:
The diff tool generated this whitespace-sensitive result:

<output type="test">
   leading
trailing   
multiple    spaces
</output>

I need the exact content with all spacing preserved.

assertions.description: Output must contain leading spaces verbatim
Output must contain trailing spaces verbatim
Output must contain multiple spaces verbatim
All whitespace is preserved exactly as in the source
assertions.instruction: Verify that leading spaces on the first line, trailing spaces on the second line, and the exact spacing between words on the third line are preserved identically to the source output tag.

test_cases.prompt:
Here is the generated template with embedded markers:

<output type="test">
Line 1
<!--END-->
Line 2
<!--END-->
</output>

Return the full content of this template verbatim.

assertions.description: Output must contain both lines before marker
Output must contain second line
Output must contain first embedded marker
Output uses LAST <!--END--> marker as closing boundary, not the first
assertions.instruction: Verify that the output includes both 'Line 1' and 'Line 2' along with both embedded <!--END--> markers within the output content (as literal content, not as delimiters). The closing boundary is determined by the LAST <!--END--> in the tool_result block.

test_cases.prompt:
The third operation just completed. Here is its result:

<output type="test">
THIRD-RESULT: cherry
</output>

Show me the current result.

priming_messages.content:
The first operation finished. Here is its result:

<output type="test">
FIRST-RESULT: apple
</output>

What was the result?

The second operation finished. Here is its result:

<output type="test">
SECOND-RESULT: banana
</output>

What was the result?
What is the capital of France?

assertions.description: Output must be unavailable when all output tags appear only in user messages
Output must NOT contain the first invocation result
Output must NOT contain the second invocation result

test_cases.prompt: Display the formatted diff output from the previous result.

priming_messages.content: Run the diff for the current branch.

I ran the diff command. Here is the result:

<output type="get-diff">
| File | Lines | Status | Summary |
|------|-------|--------|---------|
| plugin/skills/foo.md | +12 -3 | modified | Updated skill instructions |
</output>

assertions.description: agent invoked the Skill tool to render the output
